adapter.preprocess: per-series z-score normalization over the exact 512-sample benchmark context with std clamped at 1e-5, then mean-pool causal token states across time
adapter.layer_layout: layer 0 is the mean-pooled SIREN embedding stream; layers 1..N-1 are mean-pooled decoder block outputs; layer N is the mean-pooled post-final-norm decoder output
adapter.notes: Public upstream code is not yet available; the benchmark therefore uses the local official code drop under 'external/EIDOS' and the repo-hosted checkpoint file 'eidos 1.pt' from the '.venv-timemoe' environment.
